required_states: RAM sharing with AWS Organizations enabled

conditions: AWS Organizations has all features enabled and RAM sharing with the organization is enabled.
decision_context: Use when a centrally owned supported resource should serve multiple accounts.
exclusions: Only resource types listed as shareable for the selected principal type are eligible.

source_references.locator: Enable resource sharing within AWS Organizations; Create a resource share
source_references.supported_proposition: Organizations integration permits organization- and OU-scoped sharing for supported resources.

statement: After RAM sharing with AWS Organizations is enabled, a resource owner can share supported resource types with its organization or selected OUs without enumerating each member account.
